content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears well-centered approaching the right-hand curve.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 21, target index = (21+5) % 121 = 26
- Target WP26: x=6.8985, y=0.9262
- Car: x=6.1188, y=0.6663, heading=-0.9116°
- dy = 0.9262 - 0.6663 = 0.2599, dx = 6.8985 - 6.1188 = 0.7797
- bearing = atan2(0.2599, 0.7797) = 18.44°
- delta = 18.44 - (-0.9116) = +19.35° → left

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.3808m, distance_from_center = 0.0177m
- is_left_of_center = false (right of center)
- edge_distance (right) = 0.3808 - 0.0177 = 0.363m → well clear

Delta ~+19.35° → |delta| 15-30°, speed=1.5, steering_angle=10

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead and WP26 bearing gives delta ~+19.4° (left/into curve), so apply moderate left steering at full speed to follow the waypoint line through the right curve entry.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight along y≈0.683 before curving right around x=6.3-7.3.",
    "Big right curve begins around WP22-30 (x~6.3-7.2, y increases from 0.7 to 1.4).",
    "After the right curve, track loops back along y≈2.77 heading left.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use steering_angle=0 on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.",
    "Car heading is ~-0.91° (nearly due east), well-centered on track.",
    "Right curve ahead requires progressive left steering (positive delta) to follow waypoints.",
    "No objects on track detected.",
    "Boundary safety check: edge_distance ~0.363m, well clear on both sides."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.8160, 5.9273, 6.0185, 6.1188],
    "y": [0.6700, 0.6677, 0.6655, 0.6663],
    "heading": [-1.209, -1.270, -1.351, -0.912]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP26 at (6.899, 0.926): bearing=18.44°, delta=+19.35° → moderate left, steer left.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 10.0
}
```
